summary: The implementation satisfies all four requirements (REQ-41 through REQ-44) with high fidelity. Backend deletion function was added with proper authentication and validation. Frontend mutation hook was created with cache invalidation. PortfolioUpload component was updated with delete buttons, confirmation dialogs, and proper UI states. However, REQ-44 (file deletion from static assets directory) cannot be fully verified from the diff evidence, as the actual file system cleanup logic is not visible in the truncated files.

missing_requirements.requirement: When a portfolio image is successfully deleted via the frontend, remove the corresponding image file from the frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory to clean up unused static assets
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows sessionStorage cleanup in useDeletePortfolioImage hook, but no evidence of actual file deletion from the frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory. Static asset cleanup would typically require backend or build-time tooling, not client-side logic.
